scene_description: A person with a gothic aesthetic poses against a pillar, walks towards the camera, and strikes several poses in front of a brick building with large wooden doors.

motion_script.action: Subject stands still, leaning against a stone pillar, looking at the camera.
Subject walks slowly and deliberately towards the camera.
Subject stops, runs both hands through their hair, and looks up and to the right.
Subject turns their body to their left profile, poses, then glances over their shoulder at the camera with a slight smile.

composition_notes: The shot is static, maintaining a centered, full-body composition of the subject. The background architecture provides strong vertical lines that frame the subject.

style.color_treatment: natural and realistic with slightly muted tones

shot_backgrounds: An outdoor covered walkway with large stone pillars, a red brick building wall, and tall wooden doors on a grey tiled floor.
